title: selaginella longissima
intro: Selaginella longissima, also known as the spike moss, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is a perennial plant with long, thin stems and small leaves, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to promote overall well-being.
